calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title Anf Require Transfer Fo Property To Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for Sountru (Petitioner).

Mr. Mraule stated that he had nothing further and was ready to submit. The Court stated that it was still in the mind set that there is not enough to transfer the property into the Family Trust. The Petition to Determine Title and Require Transfer of Property to Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Determine Title Anf Require Transfer Fo Property To Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule and Peter Myers for Sountru (Trustee).

Mr. Myers stated that there was no discussion about a Retirement Trust in 2008, that he did not know of the Beneficiary designation until Ms. Caulfield passed away, and that he thinks they are okay with the Smith Barney account because the best evidence is there with regard to intent. The Court stated that it does not think there is adequate evidence to support Hegstad. Mr. Myers also discussed the accounts going into the Estate, then pour over to the Trust and stated that end result would be the same (half to the Daughter and half to the Son). The Petition to Determine Title and Require Transfer of Property to Trust was continued to September 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Petition To Determine Title Anf Require Transfer Fo Property To Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Continued To Jul-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title Anf Require Transfer Fo Property To Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Continued To Jun-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-03-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for Petitioner.

The Court confirmed that the waivers of notice have been filed. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was denied. The Court stated that the more appropriate vehicle is to amend the existing (main) Trust rather than create a seperate Trust. Mr. Mraule will prepare the order.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Aguerre.
